zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin於1325年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾厄斯金時，他的父親Sir William Erskine of that Ilk51歲，母親Alice Stewart57歲。他和Isabel Inchmartin至少有4個女兒。他去世於1400年5月在蘇格蘭培爾享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin于1325年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾厄斯金时，他的父亲Sir William Erskine of that Ilk51岁，母亲Alice Stewart57岁。他和Isabel Inchmartin至少有4个女儿。他去世于1400年5月在苏格兰培爾享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin was born in 1325, in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, was 51 and his mother, Alice Stewart, was 57. He had at least 4 daughters with Isabel Inchmartin. He died in May 1400, in Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin est né en 1325, à Erskine, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Alice Stewart, avait 57 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 filles avec Isabel Inchmartin. Il est décédé en mai 1400, à Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin 1325 in Erskine, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Erskine of that Ilk 51 und seine Mutter Alice Stewart 57. Er hatte mit Isabel Inchmartin mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1400 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin è nato il nel 1325 nel Erskine, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Alice Stewart, aveva 57 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figlie con Isabel Inchmartin. Morì nel maggio 1400, nel Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartinが1325年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルスキンで生まれた時，父Sir William Erskine of that Ilkは51歳，母Alice Stewartは57歳であった。彼はIsabel Inchmartinとの間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1400年5月にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin(이)가 1325년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 어스킨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Erskine of that Ilk(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Stewart(은)는 57세였다. 그는 Isabel Inchmartin(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 5월 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin nasceu em 1325, em Erskine, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Alice Stewart, tinha 57 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhas com Isabel Inchmartin. Ele faleceu em maio de 1400, em Perthshire, Scotland, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin родился в 1325 г. в местности эрскаин, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Erskine of that Ilk было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Stewart, 57. У него было по крайней мере 4 дочери от Isabel Inchmartin. Он умер май 1400 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin nació en 1325, en Erskine, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Erskine of that Ilk, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Alice Stewart, tenía 57 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con Isabel Inchmartin. Murió en mayo de 1400, en Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 75 años.
